diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: Biopsy of the lesion under endoscopy demonstrated a mucoepidermoid carcinoma of the esophagus. Histopathological analysis of the tumor revealed histological characteristics typical of an esophageal MEC, including epidermoid cells arranged in nests, keratin pearl formation, and columnar mucus-secreting cells. Immunohistochemistry results confirmed the diagnosis with positive staining for p-63 and CK5/6.
